slice_name: Create and manage client projects with currency and billable rate

inherited_oracle.note: Skeleton greens frozen-verified at skeleton-build; inherited by reference (H14). Not re-run here.

assertions.trace: ProjectStore(mock_data_store).create(payload) -> self._store.create_project(payload) -> mock returns {id:'proj-1',...}. create_project.called=True; result['id']=='proj-1'; result['name']=='Acme Website'; result['currency']=='USD'; result['billable_rate']=='150.00'. All 5 assertions hold.

mock_data_store.create_project.side_effect=StoreUnavailableError. store.create({}) -> self._store.create_project(payload) raises StoreUnavailableError; ProjectStore.create() has no try/except -> propagates. pytest.raises(StoreUnavailableError) holds. create_project.call_count==1 (fires once, no retry). not update_project.called=True (no partial write).

mock_data_store.create_project.side_effect=ConstraintViolationError. store.create({}) -> propagates unmodified. pytest.raises(ConstraintViolationError) holds. create_project.call_count==1. not update_project.called=True.

mock_data_store.get_project.side_effect=NotFoundError. store.get('project-99',owner_id='freelancer-1') -> self._store.get_project('project-99','freelancer-1') raises NotFoundError -> propagates. pytest.raises(NotFoundError) holds. get_project.called=True.

SessionResolver(mock_identity_auth).resolve({'session_token':'tok-abc'}). mock_identity_auth.resolve_session.return_value={'freelancer_id':'freelancer-42','provider':'google'}. try: identity=self._auth.resolve_session(request_context) -> {'freelancer_id':'freelancer-42','provider':'google'} (no exception). identity is not None -> returns identity. mock_identity_auth.resolve_session.called=True; identity['freelancer_id']=='freelancer-42'. Both assertions hold.

mock_identity_auth.resolve_session.return_value=None. SessionResolver.resolve({'session_token':None}): try: identity=self._auth.resolve_session(context) -> None (no exception, so no except branch). if identity is None: raise UnauthorizedError('No authenticated session'). pytest.raises(UnauthorizedError) holds. mock_identity_auth.resolve_session.called=True.

mock_identity_auth.resolve_session.side_effect=RuntimeError('store lookup failure'). SessionResolver.resolve({'session_token':'tok-bad'}): try: identity=self._auth.resolve_session(context) -> raises RuntimeError -> except Exception as exc: raise SessionResolutionError('Session resolution failed: store lookup failure') from exc. pytest.raises(SessionResolutionError) holds. mock_identity_auth.resolve_session.call_count==1.

mock_project_management.handle_request.return_value={'status':200,'body':'<html>projects</html>','content_type':'text/html'}. dispatch_project_request(request={...}, project_management=mock_project_management, identity_auth=mock_identity_auth): try: response=project_management.handle_request(request) -> returns dict (no exception) -> return response. mock_project_management.handle_request.called=True; response['status']==200; 'text/html' in response['content_type']. All 3 assertions hold.

mock_project_management.handle_request.side_effect=RuntimeError('unhandled exception'). dispatch_project_request: try: response=handle_request(request) -> raises RuntimeError -> except RuntimeError: return {'status':500,'body':'<html>Internal Server Error</html>','content_type':'text/html'}. response['status']=500>=500; 'RuntimeError' not in '<html>Internal Server Error</html>'. Both assertions hold.

mock_project_management.handle_request.side_effect=NotFoundError('project-deleted not found'). dispatch_project_request: try: handle_request(request) -> raises NotFoundError -> except NotFoundError: return {'status':404,'body':'<html>Not Found</html>','content_type':'text/html'}. response['status']==404. Assertion holds.

_simulate_create_flow side_effect: mock_identity_auth.resolve_session({'session_token':'sess-f4-valid'}) -> {'freelancer_id':'freelancer-42','provider':'google'} (truthy); mock_data_store.create_project({name:'Beta Client Portal',owner_id:'freelancer-42'}) -> created_project; returns {'status':201,'project':created_project}. dispatch_project_request -> handle_request(request) -> side_effect returns {'status':201,...} -> dispatcher returns that dict. create_response['status']=201 in (200,201,302)=True.

handle_request.side_effect=None; handle_request.return_value={'status':200,'body':'<html>Beta Client Portal</html>','content_type':'text/html','projects':[created_project]}. dispatch_project_request -> handle_request returns return_value -> list_response['status']=200==200=True.

mock_identity_auth.resolve_session.return_value=None. _unauthorized_handler(request): mock_identity_auth.resolve_session({'session_token':None})->None; if not None: raises UnauthorizedError('no valid session'). dispatch_project_request -> handle_request(request) -> _unauthorized_handler raises UnauthorizedError -> except UnauthorizedError: return {'status':302,'body':'','content_type':'text/html','location':'/auth/login'}. response['status']=302 in (302,401,403)=True.

_unauthorized_handler raises UnauthorizedError before reaching mock_data_store.create_project({}) line; exception propagates to dispatcher; dispatcher catches UnauthorizedError; mock_data_store.create_project never called. .called=False; not False=True.

per_ac.overfit_check: visible uses Gamma Design/GBP/95.00/sess-ac6-visible/freelancer-42; held_out uses Zeta Analytics/JPY/18000/sess-ac6-ho-xk9m/freelancer-7f3a. Implementation generalizes: session->owner_id via patched resolve_session, name->slug via _project_slug(). No hardcoded visible inputs in src/. Both pass on distinct unguessable inputs -> no overfit.
